data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will bring heavy showers and squally thunderstorms to the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. The trough of low pressure is expected to linger over the northern part of the South China Sea during the weekend. A fresh to strong easterly airstream will affect eastern Guangdong. There will still be showers over the region. Besides, a hot southerly airstream will affect the coast of Guangdong gradually early to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260515","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"South to southeast force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with occasional showers and squally thunderstorms.
